candidates.row_label: Operating cost of real estate and fixtures
candidates.why: Specific operating cost but too narrow to represent core direct service costs.
Semantically matches COGS, but values are tiny and likely relate only to ancillary goods, not core airline service costs.

variables.notes: R:c. Candidate list clearly misses the company's core direct operating/service cost rows. This airline reports direct costs in multiple aviation-specific expense lines rather than a single classic COGS line. Selected the main direct operating cost components and excluded salaries because that line may include broader overhead as well as operations. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other aviation expenses, [Income Statement] Aircraft fuel, [Income Statement] Aircraft and engine lease, [Income Statement] Aircraft handling, landing and communication, [Income Statement] Aircraft maintenance expenses
